name: mermaid-diagrams
description: Comprehensive guide for creating software diagrams using Mermaid syntax. Use when users need to create, visualize, or document software through diagrams including class diagrams (domain modeling, object-oriented design), sequence diagrams (application flows, API interactions, code execution), flowcharts (processes, algorithms, user journeys), entity relationship diagrams (database schemas), C4 architecture diagrams (system context, containers, components), state diagrams, git graphs, pie charts,
author: softaworks
summary_zh: 这是一份教用Mermaid语法画软件图表的指南，适合需要通过各类图表来可视化、梳理或记录软件设计、系统架构与业务流程的场景。
